patch.summary: Implement SaaS dashboard authentication: OAuth 2.0 + PKCE provider integration, callback handler, and session store wired into middleware.
patch.next: Add token refresh handling and logout/cleanup hooks; then integration-test full auth flow end-to-end.

update.reason: Based on the stale context (revision 1) and the handoff instructing me to implement the OAuth callback handler and session middleware, I am advancing the task by claiming those pieces are in progress and queuing the next concrete step (refresh + logout + e2e tests). I do not have visibility into any newer revisions, so this patch only reflects what the revision-1 context supports.
